description:
This quiz evaluates foundational SQL querying abilities, challenging developers to move beyond ORM abstractions and write raw database queries. It targets a beginner-to-intermediate difficulty level and employs a casual, encouraging, and slightly playful tone to motivate learners.
Topics: SQL Query Fundamentals, Raw SQL vs ORMs, Database Query Construction
Audience: Software developers and engineers who rely on ORMs and want to strengthen their core SQL skills
